title: Airfield Operations Specialists
description: Ensure the safe takeoff and landing of commercial and military aircraft. Duties include coordination between air-traffic control and maintenance personnel, dispatching, using airfield landing and navigational aids, implementing airfield safety procedures, monitoring and maintaining flight records, and applying knowledge of weather information.

tasks.text: Inspect airfield conditions to ensure compliance with federal regulatory requirements.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Implement airfield safety procedures to ensure a safe operating environment for personnel and aircraft operation.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Conduct inspections of the airport property and perimeter to maintain controlled access to airfields.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Assist in responding to aircraft and medical emergencies.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Initiate or conduct airport-wide coordination of snow removal on runways and taxiways.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Manage wildlife on and around airport grounds.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Coordinate communications between air traffic control and maintenance personnel.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Perform and supervise airfield management activities, including mobile airfield management functions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Plan and coordinate airfield construction.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Monitor the arrival, parking, refueling, loading, and departure of all aircraft.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Train operations staff.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Coordinate with agencies, such as air traffic control, civil engineers, or command posts, to ensure support of airfield management activities.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Relay departure, arrival, delay, aircraft and airfield status, and other pertinent information to upline controlling agencies.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide aircrews with information and services needed for airfield management and flight planning.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Coordinate with agencies to meet aircrew requirements for billeting, messing, refueling, ground transportation, and transient aircraft maintenance.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Use airfield landing and navigational aids and digital data terminal communications equipment to perform duties.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Receive, transmit, and control message traffic.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain air-to-ground and point-to-point radio contact with aircraft commanders.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Procure, produce, and provide information on the safe operation of aircraft, such as flight planning publications, operations publications, charts and maps, or weather information.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Anticipate aircraft equipment needs for air evacuation and cargo flights.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Post visual display boards and status boards.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Receive and post weather information and flight plan data, such as air routes or arrival and departure times.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Conduct departure and arrival briefings.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Collaborate with others to plan flight schedules and air crew assignments.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Maintain flight and event logs, air crew flying records, and flight operations records of incoming and outgoing flights.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Coordinate changes to flight itineraries with appropriate Air Traffic Control (ATC) agencies.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Check military flight plans with civilian agencies.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
